title: people fucking suck
author: corbin
body:
i really just can't stand being around people anymore. everybody is just so
completely wrapped up in their own shit and they always have this massive
fucking attitude. no matter where you go people are just rude for absolutely
no reason. it's like basic decency doesn't even exist. everyone just walks
around acting like they're better than you.
that's why i got so into guns. people find out you like firearms and
they immediately look at you weird. but i just love them. they make sense to
me. it's the mechanics, man. you clean them, you take care of them, and they work. a gun
doesn't talk down to you or use you.
it's not like people treat me like some creep or cross the street to avoid me either. they actually talk to me. they smile and engage with me all the time. but it's always for the wrong fucking reasons. they just use me. they need a favor, or someone to dump their baggage on, or someone to fix their problems, and suddenly i'm their best friend. they smile to my face but i know they talk behind my back. i'm not a real person to them, i'm just a utility they keep around.
it gets so fucking lonely though. you can be right in the middle of a group
hanging out and laughing, and it just physically hurts because you know how
completely excluded you actually are. it's like everyone silently agreed to
only keep me around for what they can extract from me. you can be surrounded by people and still be completely invisible. the most frustrating part is that i actually can care. i can love. i have the capacity to appreciate people and be a good person if someone just gave me a genuine fucking chance. if they just wanted me around for ME, without the hidden agendas and the transaction of it all, i could actually be a good guy to have around. but they don't even give me the option. the second i stop being useful to them, or the second i actually show who i am, they just flip
on me and
assume
the
absolute
fucking
worst.
so why should i even try to be nice anymore? why should i put myself out there just to get used and treated like dirt by people who don't even actually care to know me? honestly, i want you to be as miserable as me.
